title: Opening for Production Engineer at Finolex Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Finolex Industries
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
